body.title: Nanny Ogg quotes table — responses to nonsense prompts
body.result: 40 Nanny Ogg quotes in devices/nanny/quotes.py; handle_unknown_prompt() returns random quote; Librarian MCP unavailable — noted in module
body.intention: I intend that Nanny Ogg responds to prompts that make no sense to her with a Nanny Ogg quote rather than an error, staying in character.
body.description:
Add a quotes module with >= 10 (target 100) Nanny Ogg quotes from the Discworld canon. When Nanny Ogg receives a prompt she can't interpret as a scheduling command, she returns a random quote. Test the Librarian research feature as a source for additional quotes.

**Affected files:** devices/nanny_ogg/quotes.py (new), devices/nanny_ogg/device.py (handle_unknown_prompt method)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Quote table + random selection + unknown-prompt handler in device.py. Out of scope: NLP to classify what counts as nonsense (simple: anything not matching a cron command pattern).
**Completion criteria:** devices/nanny_ogg/quotes.py contains >= 10 quotes; calling handle_unknown_prompt() returns a string from the table; module has a comment noting the Librarian research pass was attempted.
